channel.title: NPR Topics: Culture
channel.description: Art and entertainment commentary plus interviews, book reviews, movie reviews, music reviews, comedy, and visual art. Subscribe to podcasts and follow trends in music, painting, art, architecture, photography, and design.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni settle dispute weeks before scheduled trial
item.description: In a joint statement, lawyers for the actors said they hoped the settlement would bring "closure."
item.content:encoded:
In a joint statement, lawyers for the actors said they hoped the settlement would bring "closure."

(Image credit: AP)
item.dc:creator: Chloee Weiner

item.title: See the looks from the 2026 Met Gala red carpet
item.description: Extravagantly dressed celebrities and designers made their way up the famous Met staircase Monday evening. The fundraiser is one of the fashion industry's biggest nights.
item.content:encoded:
Extravagantly dressed celebrities and designers made their way up the famous Met staircase Monday evening. The fundraiser is one of the fashion industry's biggest nights.

(Image credit: Angela Weiss)
item.dc:creator: Emily Bogle

item.title: A comedian launched a fake DHS tip line to report undocumented immigrants
item.description: Comedian Ben Palmer specializes in pranks. One of his more recent ideas for a prank was to set up a fake tip line for people to call in and report undocumented immigrants. He got hundreds of calls.
item.content:encoded: Comedian Ben Palmer specializes in pranks. One of his more recent ideas for a prank was to set up a fake tip line for people to call in and report undocumented immigrants. He got hundreds of calls.
item.dc:creator: Jasmine Garsd

item.title: A group of intergenerational mall walkers in Portland makes exercise performance art
item.description: In Portland, Ore., an intergenerational group has started a joyful weekly mall walking tradition, complete with colorful costumes.
item.content:encoded: In Portland, Ore., an intergenerational group has started a joyful weekly mall walking tradition, complete with colorful costumes.
item.dc:creator: Deena Prichep

item.title: Here are the 2026 Pulitzer Prize winners
item.description: Award winners include authors Daniel Kraus, Jill Lepore and Yiyun Li, opinion writer M. Gessen and staffers and contributors at The Washington Post, Reuters and AP.
item.content:encoded:
Award winners include authors Daniel Kraus, Jill Lepore and Yiyun Li, opinion writer M. Gessen and staffers and contributors at The Washington Post, Reuters and AP.

(Image credit: Thos Robinson)
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: In 'John of John,' father and son are gay -- and they're keeping it from each other
item.description: Like a number of his characters, Booker Prize-winning novelist Douglas Stuart grew up working class and queer in Glasgow. He went on to have a career in fashion, which plays into his latest novel.
item.content:encoded: Like a number of his characters, Booker Prize-winning novelist Douglas Stuart grew up working class and queer in Glasgow. He went on to have a career in fashion, which plays into his latest novel.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gross

item.title: The many ways Trump wants to change D.C., from buildings to statues to parks
item.description: Many of the changes Trump wants to make to the White House and the city are facing legal challenges. Some are reversible, while others could reshape the nation's capital for generations to come.
item.content:encoded:
Many of the changes Trump wants to make to the White House and the city are facing legal challenges. Some are reversible, while others could reshape the nation's capital for generations to come.

(Image credit: Tom Brenner, Rahmat Gul, Mark Schiefelbein, Jon Elswick)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: At the 2026 Met Gala, 'Fashion is Art.' Here's what to expect
item.description: On the first Monday of every May, the rich, famous and well-dressed gather in New York City for the Met Gala fundraiser. Ivy Buck offers a lookahead - covering this year's theme, where to watch, who's coming, and more.
item.content:encoded:
On the first Monday of every May, the rich, famous and well-dressed gather in New York City for the Met Gala fundraiser. Ivy Buck offers a lookahead - covering this year's theme, where to watch, who's coming, and more.

(Image credit: Savion Washington)
item.dc:creator: Ivy Buck

item.title: 'Adolescence' creator talks teenage masculinity again for 'Lord of the Flies' series
item.description: Jack Thorne adapted Lord of the Flies into a four-part TV series to show the story unfolding through the eyes of each of the four main characters.
item.content:encoded:
Lord of the Flies, the latest adaptation of William Golding's 1954 novel.'/>

Jack Thorne adapted Lord of the Flies into a four-part TV series to show the story unfolding through the eyes of each of the four main characters.

(Image credit: J Redza)
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: A group of intergenerational mall walkers in Portland makes exercise performance art
item.description: In Portland, Oregon, an intergenerational group has started a joyful weekly mall walking tradition, complete with colorful costumes.
item.content:encoded: In Portland, Oregon, an intergenerational group has started a joyful weekly mall walking tradition, complete with colorful costumes.
item.dc:creator: Deena Prichep
